title: Pestshield Mosquito and Insect Aerosol Repellent 100ml
features: KEEP FLYING INSECTS AWAY: Pestshield repellent aerosol spray contains the active ingredient Eucalyptus Citriodora Hydrated; which strongly helps repel mosquitos, insects and biting bugs; keeping your family safe and itch free wherever you are

SAFE FAMILY TRAVELING: Pestshield Repellent Aerosol is a great way to keep yourself and family protected from nasty bites; mosquito and Insect repellent is proven to affect an insects senses such as smell and taste, preventing the chance of bites which cause rashes and itches

HOURS OF PROTECTION: Pestshield Repellent Aerosol has a long lasting effect; up to 4 hours of protection which is perfect to protect the whole family on trips and holidays; reapply every 3-4 hours for protection all day long

HOW TO USE: Apply as necessary to exposed areas of skin; when applying to face spray a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth; length of effectiveness varies depending on things such as activity and level of perspiration
For best results apply and allow to dry before applying sunscreen; renew application every 3-4 hours or as necessary, and after swimming
description: Pestshield repellent aerosol spray contains the active ingredient Eucalyptus Citriodora Hydrated. Which strongly helps repel mosquitos, insects and biting bugs. Keeping your family safe and itch free wherever you are! Pestshield Repellent Aerosol are a great way to keep yourself and family protected from nasty bites. Mosquito & Insect repellent is proven to affect an insects senses such as smell and taste, preventing the chance of bites which cause rashes and itches. Pestshield Repellent Aerosol has a long lasting effect. Up to 4 hours of protection which is perfect to protect the whole family on trips and holidays. Reapply every 3-4 hours for protection all day long! Apply as necessary to exposed areas of skin. When applying to face spray a small amount into hands and apply evenly, taking care to avoid eyes and mouth. Length of effectiveness varies depending on things such as activity and level of perspiration. For best results apply and allow to dry before applying sunscreen. Renew application every 3-4 hours or as necessary, and after swimming.
